title: planchonella australis
intro: Planchonella australis, also known as the green ironwood, is a species of tree native to Australia, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The medicinal properties of Planchonella australis are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Planchonella australis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
